TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lloyd_Batts, title = Lloyd_Batts, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lloyd_Batts} }

S.FORM: Lloyd Batts sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 5, Lloyd Batts, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lloyd Batts sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 5, Lloyd Batts, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lloj* βatts~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, lloj* βatts~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
